race.description: Ladbrokes Big Bets Copy Now Maiden
race.comment: KION'S KINGDOM (3) debuts for John Keys and owns two Longford trial wins. Jumps from the inside barrier and looks promising and ready to go in a winnable race. WOOLCLASSER (7) has raced exclusively at Hobart and was a run short over 1100m first-up. Came from the back to just miss his only second-up outing and maps well. Has a 1.5kg claim and is a serious player. ALPINE WHISKEY (1) is a leader knocking on the door. His narrow defeat here two back stacks and he drops back to a shorter sprint. He's going to give a sight. MONCLERE (4) also comes back to 1220m briefly freshened. He's running of chances, but his effort here two back would give him a hope. UNA PALOMA BLANCA (11) picked up well in the straight when beaten 1.75 lengths over 1000m at Hobart. Peaks now and the longer sprint is sure to suit.
